channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan President Lai Asserts Only Taiwan Can Decide Its Future
item.description: President Lai Ching-te stated Taiwan's future must not be decided by external forces and cannot be held hostage by fear, drawing an angry reaction from Beijing.

item.title: 🇯🇵 US Marines Test Fire Rocket System Near Mount Fuji in Rapid Drill
item.description: US Marines test fired a dozen rockets from a mobile launcher at a range in Japan's foothills near Mount Fuji, demonstrating "shoot and scoot" capabilities.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Germany Plans 260,000-Strong Bundeswehr as US Pullout Accelerates European Rearmament
item.description: Defense Minister Boris Pistorius called for expanding the Bundeswehr to 260,000 soldiers, reversing 30 years of force reductions as the US military withdrawal from Europe spurs unprecedented defense buildup.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey's Erdogan Tells Trump Iran Issues Can Be Resolved
item.description: Turkish President Erdogan told Trump in a call he welcomed the extension of a ceasefire and believes issues with Iran can be resolved, positioning Turkey as a potential mediator.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Zelensky Marks Seven Years in Office as War Defines Legacy
item.description: Seven years after taking office as a showman turned wartime leader, Zelensky's legacy is now inextricably tied to the ongoing conflict with Russia.

item.title: 🇷🇺☢️ Russia conducts nuclear warhead transport exercise amid tensions with West
item.description: Russian forces demonstrated movement of nuclear warheads in a three-day exercise, showcasing capability at a time when Moscow describes itself in an existential struggle with the West over Ukraine.

item.title: 🇱🇹 Kremlin calls Lithuanian minister Kaliningrad comments verging on insanity
item.description: Russia sharply criticized Lithuania after its foreign minister said NATO should demonstrate capability to penetrate the Russian exclave of Kaliningrad, calling the remarks "verging on insanity."

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Oil prices ease after Trump says US will end Iran war "very quickly"
item.description: Oil prices fell after Trump's comments suggesting a quick resolution to the Iran conflict eased market concerns about supply disruptions.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran's triangular coercion strategy targets global oil flows through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran has developed a sophisticated three-pronged strategy to control oil shipments through the Strait of Hormuz, creating leverage over global energy markets.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 Iran threatens regional war if US attacks, IRGC says
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps warned that any US or Israeli attacks would be met with retaliation "in places you cannot even imagine," escalating regional tensions.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese investment in Europe surges to 7-year high despite trade tensions
item.description: Chinese investment in Europe reached its highest level in seven years even as trade tensions between Beijing and Brussels continue to rise.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Over 160 oil tankers stuck in Gulf as Iran tightens grip on Hormuz
item.description: More than 160 oil tankers are stranded in the Gulf as Iran intensifies its control over the Strait of Hormuz, creating one of the worst shipping bottlenecks in recent history.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia arming missile warheads with depleted uranium, Ukraine's SBU says
item.description: Ukraine's security service claims Russia is equipping missile warheads with depleted uranium, raising concerns about radioactive contamination.

item.title: 🇱🇹 Lithuanian lawmakers shelter, Vilnius air traffic suspended due to drone incursion
item.description: Vilnius airport suspended flights and lawmakers were forced to shelter underground after a drone violated Lithuanian airspace, the latest in a series of Baltic security incidents.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran consolidating control of Hormuz with island checkpoints and diplomatic deals
item.description: Iran is establishing checkpoints on strategic islands and pursuing diplomatic agreements to tighten its grip on the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇸🇪 Rubio meets Swedish and Indian counterparts on Arctic strategy
item.description: Secretary of State Rubio held talks with Swedish and Indian officials on Arctic cooperation as competition intensifies in the polar region.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China, US reach limited trade agreements on Boeing jets and beef imports
item.description: Beijing and Washington announced limited trade deals including Chinese purchases of Boeing jets and expanded US beef exports, though major tariffs remain.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU reaches deal on US trade pact as Trump threatens new tariffs for July 4
item.description: The European Union reached a preliminary trade agreement with the US to avoid new tariffs Trump had threatened to impose by July 4.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China will buy 200 Boeing jets, seeks extension on US tariff truce
item.description: China announced plans to purchase 200 Boeing aircraft and seek extension of tariff relief measures as trade negotiations continue.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU paves way to finalize US trade deal, avoid Trump tariff hike
item.description: European officials moved to finalize a trade agreement with the US that would prevent Trump's threatened tariff increases.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Trump approval drops to 35% as Republican support softens, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds
item.description: President Trump's approval rating fell to 35% with even Republican support showing signs of erosion according to the latest Reuters/Ipsos polling.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Drones attack industrial areas in Russia's Stavropol region, governor says
item.description: Drone strikes targeted industrial facilities in southern Russia's Stavropol region, with local officials reporting damage assessments ongoing.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Fed minutes reveal divisions as officials await economic data
item.description: Federal Reserve meeting minutes showed officials split on the path forward for interest rates as they await more economic data.

item.title: 🇫🇷 Israel summons French envoy over Ben-Gvir's Gaza flotilla footage, Irish FM says she's appalled
item.description: France summoned Israel's envoy over videos of National Security Minister Ben-Gvir taunting detained Gaza flotilla activists, while Ireland's foreign minister expressed outrage at the treatment.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel needs to treat Turkey as an enemy state, culture minister says
item.description: Israel's culture minister called for treating Turkey as an enemy state amid deteriorating relations following the Gaza flotilla incident and Turkey's stance on the Iran conflict.
